mnemonics: Verilog Is Like Blueprint Design (VILBD) for hardware circuits
keyPoints: Verilog uses modules to define circuit blocks with inputs and outputs
The 'assign' keyword is used for continuous combinational logic
Semicolons are required to end statements unlike in some other languages
commonMistakes: Forgetting to end statements with semicolons
Mixing up bitwise (~) and logical (!) operators
Using blocking (=) instead of non-blocking (<=) assignments in sequential logic
